meta.source: NCDC Primary School Curriculum P.3, May 2008, ISBN 978-9970-117-05-5

organisation.mediumOfInstruction: First/familiar language as language of instruction, with English taught as a non-medium language unless no predominant local language exists

weeklyAllocation.strand: Creative Performing Arts (Music, Art and Crafts)

themes.title: Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child understands different ways of locating places and appreciates the various social groups in the Sub-county/Division.

subThemes.title: Name and Location of our Sub-county/Division
keyContent: Compass direction cardinal points (East, North, West, South)
Location of sub-county/division in relation to neighbouring parishes
mathematicsFocus: Forming, naming, drawing and recording sets
englishFocus: Reading and writing sentences about location

subThemes.title: Physical Features of our Sub-county/Division
keyContent: Position and importance of physical features
mathematicsFocus: Identifying place value of tens and hundreds
literacyFocus: Explaining why a compass is used

subThemes.title: People in our Sub-county/Division
mathematicsFocus: Drawing a simple school playground map
Using direction and non-standard distance measures
englishFocus: Vocabulary for leaders and community roles
Reading stories about people and activities

themes.title: Livelihood in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child applies acquired skills and appreciates the benefits of participating in different activities.

subThemes.title: Occupations of People in our Sub-county/Division and their Importance
mathematicsFocus: Place value for tens, hundreds and thousands

subThemes.title: Social Services and their Importance
mathematicsFocus: Reading and writing numbers in 10s and 100s from 1000 to 2000
Adding two 3-digit numbers vertically without carrying
englishFocus: Writing educative messages and guided compositions

subThemes.title: Challenges in Social Services and Possible Solutions
mathematicsFocus: Drawing a journey map showing direction and distance in non-standard units

themes.title: Our Environment in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child appreciates environmental changes and applies knowledge and skills to manage the environment.

subThemes.title: Soil
keyContent: Water, air, dead plants, animals and rock particles
mathematicsFocus: Environmental measurements and number work from the theme
literacyFocus: Observing, describing and reading about soil

subThemes.title: Natural Causes of Changes in the Environment
mathematicsFocus: Number work linked to environmental observation
literacyFocus: Reading and writing about environmental changes

subThemes.title: Changes in the Environment through Human Activities
mathematicsFocus: Adding two 4-digit numbers vertically without carrying
literacyFocus: Discussing and writing about human activities in the environment
englishFocus: Vocabulary and sentences about human activities and environmental care

themes.title: Environment and Weather in our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child appreciates and conserves the environment.

subThemes.title: Air and the Sun
keyContent: The sun as a weather/energy factor
literacyFocus: Observing and explaining air and sun
englishFocus: Vocabulary and structures about air, sun and weather

subThemes.title: Water
literacyFocus: Reading and writing about water and rain

themes.title: Living Things: Animals in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child acquires, appreciates and applies basic scientific knowledge about living things in day-to-day life.

subThemes.title: Living Things
mathematicsFocus: Multiplication and classification linked to living things
literacyFocus: Naming, classifying and describing living things
englishFocus: Vocabulary for animals, insects, birds and fish

subThemes.title: Birds and Insects
literacyFocus: Observing, reading and writing about birds/insects
englishFocus: Bird and insect vocabulary and descriptive sentences

subThemes.title: Care for Insects, Birds and Animals
mathematicsFocus: Word problems in multiplication by 2, 3 and 10
literacyFocus: Discussing care for animals and insects
englishFocus: Animal care vocabulary and action sentences

themes.title: Living Things: Plants in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child appreciates the uses of different plants and participates in crop production for self-reliance.

subThemes.title: Plants and their Habitat
literacyFocus: Naming and describing plants and habitats

subThemes.title: Parts of a Flowering Plant and their Uses
englishFocus: Vocabulary for plant parts and uses

subThemes.title: Crop-growing Practices
mathematicsFocus: Dividing up to 300 by 2, 3, 4 and 5 without remainder

themes.title: Managing Resources in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child understands and demonstrates proper management of resources.

subThemes.title: Spending Resources
keyContent: Things we use and spend on

subThemes.title: Projects
keyContent: Projects as activities for knowledge, skills or money

themes.title: Keeping Peace in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child understands and participates in different ways of living harmoniously with others.

subThemes.title: Child Rights, Needs and their Importance
Child Responsibility
keyContent: Respect parents, teachers, elders and other children

themes.title: Culture and Gender in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child understands and appreciates different cultures and demonstrates awareness of gender issues that promote harmonious living.

subThemes.title: Ways of Promoting and Preserving Culture

themes.title: Health in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child demonstrates knowledge and skills of preventing and controlling common diseases for a healthy life.

subThemes.title: HIV/AIDS
keyContent: Ways of caring for HIV/AIDS patients

themes.title: Basic Technology in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child applies basic scientific knowledge and skills in processing and making materials for self-reliance.

subThemes.title: Processing and Making Things from Natural Materials
keyContent: Sources such as swamp, plantation and bush
Products such as mats, ropes, juice and salads

subThemes.title: Making Things from Artificial Materials
keyContent: Uses for play, selling, decoration and wearing

themes.title: Energy in Our Sub-county/Division
themes.expectedLearningOutcome: The child appreciates the existence of energy and demonstrates knowledge and skills of using and preserving it.

subThemes.title: Sources of Energy
mathematicsFocus: Adding and subtracting 4-digit numbers with/without carrying/borrowing as revision
englishFocus: Present, past and future tense revision

subThemes.title: Ways of Saving Energy
mathematicsFocus: Measuring length and distance for tree planting
literacyFocus: Reading and writing messages on saving energy

subThemes.title: Dangers of Energy and Ways of Avoiding Them
mathematicsFocus: Measuring length, capacity, weight, time and money as revision
literacyFocus: What to do during fire outbreak
